title: Notification No.52/2016-Cus(NT), dated 13.04.2016
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance Department of Revenue Notification No. 52/2016 - Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, dated the 13th April, 2016 S.O. (E). -In exercise of powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub-section (1) of section 5 of Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints officers mentioned in column (5) to act as a common adjudicating authority to exercise powers and discharge duties conferred or imposed on officers mentioned in column (4) of Table below in respect of show cause notices specified in column (3) of the Table for purpose of adjudication of show cause notices specified in the table:- TABLE Sl.
